title: peltaea surumuensis
constituents: Peltaea surumuensis has many active constituents, such as flavonoids like kaempferol and quercetin, as well as phenolic acids like ferulic acid and sinapic acid, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds can help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis and improve cardiovascular health by reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Additionally, the plant contains alkaloids like berberine and glycosides like peltatone, which have been found to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities, potentially aiding in the prevention of infections and the treatment of respiratory diseases. By harnessing the medicinal properties of Peltaea surumuensis, individuals can enjoy improved overall well-being and enhanced quality of life.
